compiled_state.title: Write RED tests for pre-* dispatcher fail-open ERR handling
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## testing_mode: RED

## What
Create tests/hooks/test-pre-dispatcher-err-handler.sh with behavioral tests verifying that all 7 pre-* dispatchers fail open (exit 0) and write a JSONL entry when an unexpected ERR occurs.

## File Impact
| Action | File |
|--------|------|
| CREATE | tests/hooks/test-pre-dispatcher-err-handler.sh |
| MODIFY | .test-index |

## Tests to Add
1. test_pre_bash_err_fails_open — insert deliberate 'false' after handler registration in pre-bash.sh, verify dispatcher exits 0 and JSONL entry written to ~/.claude/logs/dso-hook-errors.jsonl
2. test_pre_all_err_fails_open — same for pre-all.sh
3. test_pre_edit_err_fails_open — same for pre-edit.sh
4. test_pre_write_err_fails_open — same for pre-write.sh
5. test_pre_enterplanmode_err_fails_open — same for pre-enterplanmode.sh
6. test_pre_exitplanmode_err_fails_open — same for pre-exitplanmode.sh
7. test_pre_taskoutput_err_fails_open — same for pre-taskoutput.sh

Each test:
- Uses isolated TEST_HOME (mktemp -d)
- Stubs the dispatcher to inject a 'false' command after handler registration
- Runs the stubbed dispatcher
- Asserts exit code = 0
- Asserts ~/.claude/logs/dso-hook-errors.jsonl has a new entry with hook name and line

## .test-index entries
Add RED marker mapping: plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/pre-bash.sh:[test_pre_bash_err_fails_open]
(and similar for the other 6 files)

These tests must FAIL (RED) before the dispatchers are modified to source hook-error-handler.sh.
